name: list_dir
description: List contents of a directory within the knowledge base. Use this to discover files and navigate the directory structure before reading specific files.

path.description: Directory path to list. Must be within a registered source directory.

recursive.description: If true, list contents recursively up to max_depth. Default: false.

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth when recursive is true. Default: 3.

pattern.description: Optional filename pattern filter (e.g., '*.md', '*.pdf'). Only files matching this pattern are included.
